title: eryngium amethystinum var. amethystinum
intro: Eryngium amethystinum var. amethystinum, also known as the Cornflower Eryngium or Glacium, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae. It is a biennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which may help alleviate respiratory issues and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, Eryngium amethystinum var. amethystinum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
